attacking_style: Aggressive repeat attacker from breakaways, willing to launch solo efforts on climbs with significant distance remaining (35km+ to go). Targets penultimate climbs to force defensive reactions from chase groups.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from available observations.
terrain_preference: Functions effectively in breakaways on medium mountain stages with multiple climbs. Capable of extending gaps on climbs despite time trial specialist profile.
vulnerability: Solo attacks from distance prove unsustainable against organized team chases, as evidenced by recapture despite building 59-second advantage.
key_patterns: Double-attacks from established breakaways rather than waiting for single decisive move.
Launches efforts with 35km+ remaining, targeting penultimate climbs for maximum disruption.
Forces isolation of single chase teams through persistent acceleration patterns.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race observation insufficient to determine trajectory, though showed combative form with multiple attack attempts
